g.title: One per browser tab. Relay-backed: keeps only an in-memory graph.
Bun.serve native WS bridged into Gun's mesh (axe:false), not Gun web mode.
One host per room. Single-host invariant makes command claims uncontended.
Local HTTP server spawned by the host (free port)

g.text: Per-room GunDB graph (what flows on the blue wires; what radisk persists)

div.p: In-memory GunDB graph. No radisk / no Gun localStorage — writes must reach the relay, so the browser graph is intentionally ephemeral.
Tiny per-tab/browser prefs, not app data:

ul.li: answers get from its own store

g.text: durable on-disk copy of every room's graph

div.p: Host's GunDB graph replica. Persists to radisk so room state survives host restarts.
Binds the Gun graph ⇄ OpenCode. Idempotent, field-ownership writes.

ul.li: exactly-once: seen guard + status gate + single-host claim

g.title: One per browser tab. Relay-backed: keeps only an in-memory graph.
Bun.serve native WS bridged into Gun's mesh (axe:false), not Gun web mode.
